title: OptimisedVanilla
description: A Resource Pack which is compatible for all aspects of minecraft.
body:
A Resourcepack that optimises vanilla minecraft creating a better experience while playing.

⚠︎ This Resourcepack is mixed content of all other resourcepacks that are available online.

Includes:
- Icons
- Low Fire
- Low Shield
- Clean Water
- Better Potion Particles
